case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2829.54 CASHIERS et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2829.54 CASHIERS CHECK DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF OF REBECCA WAGNER REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,026.90 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT HELENA NONG. THE REMAINING RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $0.01 U.S. CURRENCY SHALL REMAIN IN LITIGATION PENDING FURTHER LEGAL ACTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
